sources.name: ICAI
sources.dataset: Independent Commission for Aid Impact — Annual Reviews

metadata.methodology: ODA (Official Development Assistance) measured according to OECD DAC criteria. GNI sourced from ONS. Asylum in-donor costs are expenditure within the UK on processing asylum seekers, classified as ODA under DAC rules and reported as part of the UK ODA total.
knownIssues: In-donor asylum costs are classified as ODA under OECD DAC rules and are therefore counted within the official UK aid budget, reducing funds available for programmes overseas
Figures for 2024 are provisional; FCDO typically revises statistics in the following year
The 0.7% target is enshrined in the International Development (Official Development Assistance Target) Act 2015 but government has exercised statutory discretion to spend below target
